summary: Documented Z3-to-BimodalLogic frame axiom mapping in provider.py (module docstring with terminology disambiguation, axiom mapping table, soundness analysis) and semantic.py (frame hierarchy classification, task_restriction soundness comment). Created test_frame_class_mapping.py with 13 tests performing post-hoc validation of TaskFrame axioms (nullity, converse, compose) and lawful history property on extracted Z3 countermodels. All 13 new tests pass; 184 existing bimodal tests pass (1 pre-existing BM_CM_1 failure unrelated to task 110).
